text: hey babe, you thinking takeout tonight or should I start something? 🍜
takeout sounds good, I'm wiped. that Thai place?
yes!! I'll order now, the usual? 😊
Dad are you cooking this weekend?? pleaseee make your gyoza 🥺
Haha already planned it 😄 Saturday dinner, 7pm. Tell your brother too
YESSS ok we'll be there!! can you also do that miso soup thing 🙏🙏
Dad are we still doing dinner at yours this Sunday? Maya wants to know if she should bring anything
Yes! Come around 5. Tell her not to worry, I'm making the katsu curry 😄
Say less we'll be there. Can't wait honestly, been thinking about that curry all week lol
yo you free this weekend? thinking of hitting that new ramen spot in downtown
ahhh man I'm lowkey down but Saturday afternoon only, got stuff in the morning
works for me, let's say 1pm? I'll drag Keiko too if that's cool
hey!! are we still doing our sunday call? like 4pm your time?
yeah def! 4 works, might be like 5 mins late tho lol
lmaoo ok no worries, i'll just be snacking 😂 see u then!!
Hey Daichi! Just checking in — how are you and Maya doing? Haven't heard from you guys in a bit 😊
We're good Patricia! Things have been hectic with work but we're managing. Maya's been a little under the weather but nothing serious 🤧
Oh no, poor thing! Tell her to rest up and I'll make her that soup she loves this weekend. You two should come over 💕
